name: Wanma Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Wanma Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells communication electronics and communication connection equipment. Its telecom division products include optical fiber products, outdoor telecom cabinets, copper products, broadband access integrated distribution boxes, equipment cabinets, and transmission equipment use power distribution file cabinets. The company's medical division offers medical devices. Its principal products are used in various areas, such as IDC building, cloud platform, communication network, medical field, national high-speed railway, and railway transportation construction. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Linan, China.
